errorBoundary.title: The application hit an error
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error was caught by the local error boundary. You can retry or return to the overview.

infisical.title: Infisical
infisical.description: Universal Auth credentials and Infisical site URL for the env domain.

aliyun-oss.title: Aliyun OSS
aliyun-oss.description: Aliyun OSS endpoint plus AK/SK using the S3 protocol.

tencent-cos.title: Tencent COS
tencent-cos.description: Tencent COS endpoint plus AK/SK using the S3 protocol.

aws-s3.title: AWS S3
aws-s3.description: AWS S3 region plus AK/SK; leave endpoint blank for SDK defaults.

minio.title: MinIO
minio.description: Self-hosted MinIO object storage with path-style addressing.

rustfs.title: RustFS
rustfs.description: Self-hosted RustFS object storage with path-style addressing.

kustomize.title: Kustomize
kustomize.description: Kubeconfig context for the deploy domain.

vercel.title: Vercel
vercel.description: Vercel API token with optional team slug.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare
cloudflare.description: Cloudflare API token with optional account ID.

edgeone.title: EdgeOne Pages
edgeone.description: Tencent EdgeOne Pages token with optional region.

docker.title: Docker Registry
docker.description: ACR, Docker Hub, GHCR, Harbor, or another container registry.

detail.unknownSectionBody: {{domain}}/{{backend}} is not a valid (domain, backend) pair.
detail.empty: No profiles yet. Click 'New profile' to create the first one.
detail.confirmRemove: Delete profile "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

form.addDescription: Fill in and save. The first profile in a section is set default automatically.
form.editDescription: Saving overwrites existing values; leave secret fields blank to keep them unchanged.
form.setDefaultAfterSaveAuto: Set default after save (this section has no default yet — will set automatically)

fields.endpoint: Endpoint (leave blank for AWS S3 to use SDK defaults)
fields.forcePathStyle: force path style (MinIO / RustFS need this)
fields.teamSlug: Team slug (leave blank for personal scope)
fields.accountId: Account ID (required for multi-account tokens, otherwise leave blank)

http.networkError: Network request failed — check your connection.

issue.missingProfile: {{section}} is missing a usable credential profile{{profile}} — fill in the API key / token

missing.container: No container backend configured — `one container build` will fail
missing.deploy: No deploy backend configured — `one deploy` will fail
missing.env: Workspace has no env backend selected — set one before using `one env`

description.container: Pick a container image backend for "{{project}}" — writes to manifest projects[].domains.container.
description.deploy: Pick a deploy backend for "{{project}}" — writes to manifest projects[].domains.deploy.kind.
description.env: Pick the environment-variable backend for the whole workspace — writes to manifest domains.env.kind.

fix.note: This only writes the backend selection to the manifest. Configure the matching credential profile (API key / token) in the "{{section}}" section.
